info.title: Catalog Service
info.description:
Manage Brands, Categories, Products, and all their attributes, everything that the customer wants to sell through the sales channels

 **Last update**: 13 feb 26, 06:34 a. m.

tags.name: Sku File
tags.description: Sku files with all Skus by Warehouses

post.description: Create a attribute

Create or update massive attribute items. The maximum of attributes admitted is `10000`.

- The field 'accountsReferenceIds' refer to `referenceId` fields.
- The field 'categoryReferenceId' refer to `referenceId` fields.
- The field 'groupReferenceId' refer to `referenceId` attribute group fields.

If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the Attribute already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The attributes to insert or update

post.description: Create a attribute-group

post.summary: Massive insert or update attribute groups
post.description:
Create or update massive attribute groups. The maximum of attribute groups admitted is `10000`.
- The field `accountsReferenceIds` refer to `referenceId` field of the [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account) entity.

- If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the attribute groups already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The attribute groups to insert or update

post.description: Create a Attribute Set

Create or update massive attribute-set items. The maximum of attributes-sets admitted is `300`.

If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the Attribute-set already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The attributes-set to insert or update

post.description: Create a barcode-type
Create a brand

Create or update massive brand items. The maximum of brands admitted is `1000`.
- The field 'accountsReferenceIds' refer to `referenceId` fields.

- If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the Brand already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The brands to insert or update

post.description: Create a category

Create or update massive category items. The maximum of categories admitted is `1000`.

- The fields `parentReferenceId` and 'accountsReferenceIds' refer to `referenceId` fields.

- If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the Category already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The categories to insert or update

post.description: Create a single Complement

get.description: Get a single complement by ID

put.description: Update a single complement by ID

post.description:
Create or update massive complement items. The maximum of complements admitted is `1000`.
- The field 'defaultSkuReferenceIds' refer to `referenceId` fields.

- If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the complement already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

requestBody.description: The complements to insert or update

post.description: Create a measurement-unit

Create or update massive attribute items. The maximum of attributes admitted is `10000`.

- The fields `productReferenceId` and `attributeReferenceId` refer to `referenceId` fields.

Create or update massive product items. The maximum of products admitted is `1000`.
- The fields `brandReferenceId`, `categoryReferenceId` and `salesChannelsReferenceIds` refer to `referenceId` fields of each entity.
- The fields `keywords` and `salesChannelsReferenceIds` can be cleared with an empty `array`(`[]`)

requestBody.description: The products to insert or update

post.description: Create a Product Group

Create massive related skus. The maximum of related skus admitted is `10000`.
- The fields `similarReferenceIds`, `accessoriesReferenceIds` and `suggestedReferenceIds` refer to `referenceId` field of the [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) entity.
- If a **current relation** between two skus **is not received**, it will **be removed** from database.

get.description: Get the setting of an entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be retrieved

schema.description: A key-value object of the settings

put.summary: Update the setting of an entity
put.description: Update the setting of an entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The name of the entity that owns the settings to be updated

schema.description: A key-value object of the settings

post.description:
Create or update massive sku attribute items. The maximum of attributes admitted is `10000`.

- The fields `skuReferenceId` and `attributeReferenceId` refer to `referenceId` fields.

Create or update massive sku items. The maximum of skus admitted is `1000`.
- The field `productReferenceId` refer to `referenceId` **Product** field.
- The fields `sellingMeasurementUnit` and `measurementUnit` refer to `code` **Measurement Unit** fields.
- The field `eans` will be set as `[]` if not send while creating new sku.

requestBody.description: The skus to insert or update

get.summary: Get a list of Images from all SKUs
get.description: Get a list of Images from all SKUs

post.summary: Massive save, upload or remove Images from SKUs v2.
post.description:
Massive save, upload or remove Images from SKUs. The maximum of skus images admitted is `1000`.

This Api works exactly the same way as [SaveSkuImageBatch](/v2/service/catalog#operation/saveSkuImageBatch), it only changes the request body to allow Janis uses Batch Import schemas.
Clean the retries count for the Skus-Images and restart the process to Upload it

force.description: When it property is set with "true", cleans the retries for every Image pending to upload, no matters if it reached or not the max-number for retries, when it is set with "false", it only clean for Images that has been reached the max-number of retries

200.description: Image download retry process has started.

post.description:
Depending on the entity, the API may receive different fields to translates.
- For `entity: product`
  - `translates[languageFullCode].name`: 'The name'
  - `translates[languageFullCode].keywords`: ['key-1', 'key-2']
Create a product

200.description:
Attributes and values.
- The keys are the IDs of the Attributes. This refer to the `id` of the [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) Entity.
- The values are the value/s of the Attribute for the product.

post.description: Load the attribute values ​​of a product

requestBody.description:
Object with the values ​​of the Attributes to assign.
"Property name *" are the ids of the Attribute and the values are the value/s of the Attribute for the product/sku the and ​​must respect the fieldType of the Attributes.
This refers to the `id` and the` fieldType` of the **Attribute** entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

requestBody.description:
Object with the values ​​of the Related Skus to assign.
"Property name *" are the types of related Skus (**similar**, **accessories**, **suggested**) and the values are *Arrays* with the Ids of the Related Skus.
The Ids refers to the `id` of the **Sku** entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

get.summary: Get the attributes values ​​of a sku
get.description: Get the attributes values ​​of a sku

200.description:
Attributes and values.
- The keys are the IDs of the Attributes. This refer to the `id` of the [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) Entity.
- The values are the value/s of the Attribute for the sku.

post.summary: Add the attribute values ​​of a sku
post.description: Add the attribute values ​​of a sku

requestBody.description:
Object with the values ​​of the Attributes to assign.
"Property name *" are the ids of the Attribute and the values are the value/s of the Attribute for the product/sku the and ​​must respect the fieldType of the Attributes.
This refers to the `id` and the` fieldType` of the **Attribute** entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

commerceId.description:
The ID used by the external platform related to this record (e.g, VTEX, Magento).

***If number is received, it will be saved as string.***

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

dateCreatedRange.description: The day of creation by date range

dateModifiedRange.description: The day of last modification by date range

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

accountsIds.description: The Related Account's IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

accountsReferenceIds.description: The Related Account's Reference IDs. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

addAccountsReferenceIds.description: The Related Additional Account's Reference IDs. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

productReferenceId.description: The Product Parent Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Product** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product)

attributeReferenceId.description: The Attribute Parent Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute)

skuReferenceId.description: The Sku Parent Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku)

languageFullCode.description: The language for the translates to be saved. This refer to the `fullCode` of the **Languages** Entity. See [Languages](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Languages)

group.description: The Attribute's group's ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Attribute Group** Entity. See [Attribute Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Group).

category.description:
The Category ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).
If `null` or not set it means that the attribute applies to all the products in catalog.

isRequired.description: Determines if the attribute is required

appliesToSkus.description: Determines if the attribute applies to skus or products

options.description: The Attribute's possible values. If `boolean` type is selected as `fieldType`, the options will be `'false'` and `'true'`.

defaultValue.description:
The default value for the **Product** or **Sku** if no value is defined.
When `options` are defined, `defaultValue` must be one of them.

name.description:
The Attribute's name.

**Required** only for new Attributes.

fieldType.description:
The Attribute's fieldType.

**Required** only for new Attributes.

groupReferenceId.description: The Attribute Group Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Attribute-Group** Entity. See [Attribute-Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Group).

categoryReferenceId.description: The Category Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

AttributeGroupBatch.description: A Attribute group for Massive Saved

name.description:
The Attribute's name.

**Required** only for new Attribute Groups.

attributes.description: Attributes related to the Attribute Set

items.description: An Attribute related to the Attribute Set

attributeId.description: This refer to the `id` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

attributeGroupId.description: This refer to the `id` of the **Attribute Group** Entity. See [Attribute Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Group).

AttributesByGroupBatch.description:
The categories by sales channels used in API List for Batch Service (for Export) and API Batch.

* Key: The Attribute-Group Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **AttributeGroup** Entity. See [Attribute Group](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Attribute-Group).
* Value: An Array of Attribute Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

AttributesByGroupForImport.description:
The attributes fields used for Batch Service (for Import).

* Key: The Attribute-Group Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **AttributeGroup** Entity. See [Attribute Group](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Attribute-Group).
* Value: The Attribute Reference ID separated by a comma `,`. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

AttributeValues.description:
Attributes and values.
- The keys are the IDs of the Attributes. This refer to the `id` of the [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) Entity.
- The values are the value/s of the Attribute for the product/sku.

length.description: The Barcode length, if it is of the ean12 or ean13 type, its value will always be 13

catalogation.description: Object with cataloging configuration of a Barcode.

referenceIdPosition.description: Initial and final position of the referenceId within the code

start.description: Start position of the referenceId within the code, starting from position 0

end.description: End position of the referenceId within the code

completeWithZero.description: Indicates if the code variable parts should be completed with zeros

useVerificationCode.description: Indicates if the Barcode implements verification code

variables.description:
Objects array with variable configurations of a Barcode
- May not have elements
- If the type of barcode is `ean12` or `ean13` only accept one variable
- If the type of barcode is `ean12` or `ean13` only accept variables of type `quantity` or `price`
- If the type of barcode is `code128`, accept one or more variables of any type but they cannot be repeated.

start.description: Start of configuration position in Barcode code

end.description: End of configuration position in Barcode code

features.description:
Barcode Additional Configuration Object
  - Only applicable for variables of type `price` or `quantity`
  - If the type of variable is `price` accepts the next properties:
    - `decimals`: It's the number of decimal places
    - `useCatalogPrice`: Determines if should use EAN price or Catalog price
  - If the variable type is `quantity` accept the `unitMultiplier` property
    - Is a weightable property (`kg`, `g`, `un` or `unit`)

unitMultiplier.description: Unit type for quantity type setting

decimals.description: Decimal value for price type setting

useCatalogPrice.description: Determines if should use the Item's price in Catalog instead of the one in the barcode

slug.description:
The Brand's slug.
This field is usually used as the URL of the brand.

isFeatured.description: Determines if the brand is featured

name.description:
The Brand's name.

**Required** only for new Brands.

parentId.description: The Parent Category ID. This refer to the `id` of this **Category** Entity.

slug.description:
The Category's slug.
This field is usually used as the URL of the category.

nameTree.description: The Category's name tree including the current Category.
nameTree.example: First level category - Second level category

incompatibleCategories.description:
The categories that cannot be mixed in the same package.
This refer to the `id` of the [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category) Entity.
See more information about packages here: [Package](/v2/service/packing#tag/Package).

enableAutoSuggestions.description: When it is enabled the SKU of this category will be automatic related with "suggested" relationship

name.description:
The category's name.

**Required** only for new Categories.

parentReferenceId.description: The Category Parent Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

incompatibleCategoriesReferenceIds.description:
The categories that cannot be mixed in the same package.  
This refer to the `referenceId` of the [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category) Entity.  
See more information about packages here: [Package](/v2/service/packing#tag/Package).

require.description: Determines if the complement is require

visibility.description: The Complement's visibility in Janis Apps, if it must show in (or not) in the Apps

defaultSku.description: The SKU that must be used as default complement. This refer to the `id` of the **SKU** Entity. See [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

name.description:
The Complement's name.

**Required** only for new Complements.

defaultSkuReferenceId.description: The Default SKU's Reference IDs. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **SKU** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

fullCode.description: The full code (concatenating code and variant with a hyphen, or just the code if variant is empty)

fallback.description: The fallback language full code (code or code-variant)

productId.description:
The unique identifier of the product.
This refer to the `id` of the [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product) Entity.

attributeId.description:
The unique identifier of the product attribute.
This refer to the `id` of the [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) Entity.

ProductAttributeSingleValue.description: The product attribute value when is a single value.

ProductAttributeMultipleValues.description: The product attribute value when is a multiple value.

shouldRemove.description: Indicates if product attribute should be removed

ProductAttributeBatchResponseItem.description: A Product Attribute response for Api Batch

ProductAttributeBatchError.description: A Product Attribute with error message for Api Batch

name.description:
The Product's name.

**Required** only for new Products.

catalogId.description: (Optional) It refers to the `id` of a Product (See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product)). When this field is sent the `referenceId` can be changed

brandReferenceId.description:
The Brand Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Brand** Entity. See [Brand](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Brand).

**Required** only for new Products.

categoryReferenceId.description:
The Category Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

**Required** only for new Products.

salesChannelsReferenceIds.description:
The Sales Channels Reference IDs. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

**Only valid if neither *addSalesChannelsReferenceIds* nor *removeSalesChannelsReferenceIds* are received**

addSalesChannelsReferenceIds.description:
The Additional Sales Channels Reference IDs. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

**Only valid if *salesChannelsReferenceIds* is not received**

**If matching *addSalesChannelsReferenceIds* and *removeSalesChannelsReferenceIds* are received, the remove operation will be performed last.
This will remove any sales channels that are also present in *addSalesChannelsReferenceIds***

removeSalesChannelsReferenceIds.description:
The Sales Channels Reference IDs to be removed. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

**Only valid if *salesChannelsReferenceIds* is not received**

**If matching *addSalesChannelsReferenceIds* and *removeSalesChannelsReferenceIds* are received, the remove operation will be performed last.
This will remove any sales channels that are also present in *addSalesChannelsReferenceIds***

attributeSetReferenceId.description: The Attribute Set Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Attribute Set** Entity. See [Attribute Set](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Set).

CategoriesBySalesChannelImport.description:
The categories by sales channels used for Batch Service (for Import).

* Key: The Sales Channel Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).
* Value: The Category Reference ID separated by a comma `,`. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

ProductGroupConditionals.description:
The **ProductGroup**'s conditionals

Conditionals are used so that, after a product group assigns the products, the services apply the behavior by validating those conditionals.

warehousesIds.description: Products warehouses. This refer to the `id` of the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

ProductGroupBehaviors.description:
Behaviors for the **ProductGroup** cross services

For example if a product needs one specific package to be transported is defined here

See possible behaviors below

barcode.description: This object contains properties of a BarcodeType [BarcodeType](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Barcode-Type).

pickingLowerThreshold.description: The lower threshold for the picking process. Is related to the type selected in `eanMeasurementUnit`.

pickingUpperThreshold.description: The upper threshold for the picking process. Is related to the type selected in `eanMeasurementUnit`.

requireBatch.description: Indicates if products need the batch data when picking them

requireExpirationDate.description: Indicates if products need the expiration date when picking them

autoPicking.description: Indicates if a product does not need to be physically picked, as in the case of a `Gif Card`, if the product must be conventionally picked this property must be `false`.

deliveryRequiresPhoto.description: Indicates if products need photo when picking them

candidateType.description: Indicates if products can be picked as candidateToPick

showIconOnApp.description: Indicates if the Icon must be shown in APP

invoiceMeasurementUnit.description:
The Measurement Unit that will be used in the Invoice process.
* `sellingMeasurementUnit` the field `sellingMeasurementUnit` of the [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) will be used.
* `measurementUnit` the field `measurementUnit` of the [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) will be used.

preferredFulfillmentWarehouses.description:
A list of Warehouse IDs that will have higher priority for the fulfillment plan of the products of this group.

This field applies only if the DOM is set to run with the **Advanced engine**.

packageTypes.description: The Product's package type `id`. This refer to the `id` of the **Package Type** Entity. See [PackageType](/v2/service/packing/PackageType).

requiresPreparation.description: Products that require some preparation. For example weight and packaging.

preparationDaysOffset.description: The offset in days for the preparation process.

shippingTypeCodes.description: The Product's shipping type `codes`. This refer to the `code` of the **Shipping Types** Entity. See [Shipping Type](/v2/service/delivery#operation/).

shippingTypes.description: The Product's shipping type `id`. This refer to the `id` of the **Shipping Types** Entity. See [Shipping Type](/v2/service/delivery#operation/).

productCanBeRotated.description:
Products that can be rotated.

* `default` the behavior is not defined at the product group level.
* `yes` the product can be rotated.
* `no` the product cannot be rotated.

> For example, when preparing the delivery, it helps to determine which items can be rotated.

complementIds.description: The Complement's `id`. This refer to the `id` of the **Complement** Entity. See [Complement](/v2/service/catalog/Complement).

ProductGroupBehaviorsRequest.description:
Behaviors for the **ProductGroup** cross services

For example if a product needs one specific package to be transported is defined here

See possible behaviors below

barcode.description: This object contains the `id` property which will match the id [BarcodeType](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Barcode-Type).

ProductGroupRules.description:
Required rules for the products to be part the group.
The Products must match every rule.
**At least one Rule is required**

eanStartsWith.description: The rule will try to match the products which `skus` in [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product) has an `EAN` that start with this property.

referenceIdStartsWith.description: The rule will match with the products which `skus` in [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product) has an `referenceId` that start with this property

categories.description: This rule will match the `id` of [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category) with the `categoriesIds` of [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product)

measurementUnits.description: This rule will match the `code` of [Measurement Unit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit) with the `sellingMeasurementUnit` of [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku)

excludedSkusIds.description: This rule is restrictive, it will exclude products that match this rule. It will try to match the products which `skus` in [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product) has an `id` among those indicated in this array.

productAttribute.description: This rule will match the `attributeId` and `value` of [Product-Attribute] v2/service/catalog#tag/Product-Attribute

skuAttribute.description: This rule will match the `attributeId` and `value` of [Sku-Attribute] v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku-Attribute

salesChannels.description: This rule will match the `id` of [SalesChannel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel) with the `salesChannels` of [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product)

type.description: Type of relationship between between `skuId` and `relatedSkuId`

similar.description: Ids of Skus **'similar'** to the current one

accessories.description: Ids of Skus **'accessories'** to the current one

suggested.description: Ids of Skus **'suggested'** for the current one

items.description: An object that contains the id of a sku and the types of relationships it has

similar.description: Id and ReferenceId of Skus **'similar'** to the current one

accessories.description: Id and ReferenceId of Skus **'accessories'** to the current one

suggested.description: Id and ReferenceId of Skus **'suggested'** for the current one

RelatedSkusIdAndReferenceId.description: An object containing the id and reference id of the related sku

RelatedSkuBatch.description: A related Sku for massive save.

referenceId.description:
The Reference id of the main Sku

**Required** always.

similarReferenceIds.description: The Reference ids of the Related Similar Sku

accessoriesReferenceIds.description: The Reference ids of the Related Accessories Sku

suggestedReferenceIds.description: The Reference ids of the Related Suggested Sku

skuId.description:
The unique identifier of the sku.
This refer to the `id` of the [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) Entity.

attributeId.description:
The unique identifier of the product attribute.
This refer to the `id` of the [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute) Entity.

value.description: The sku attribute value. If there is more than one value, this property must be an **array** of values.

isMultiple.description: True if the attribute has more than one value.

shouldRemove.description: Indicates if sku attribute should be removed

SkuAttributeBatchResponseItem.description: A Sku Attribute response for Api Batch

SkuAttributeBatchError.description: An Sku Attribute with error message for Api Batch

name.description:
The Sku name.

***Required*** only for new Skus

catalogId.description: (Optional) It refers to the `id` of a Sku (See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku)). When this field is sent the `referenceId` can be changed

productReferenceId.description:
The Product Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Product** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product).

***Required*** only for new Skus

sellingMeasurementUnit.description:
The Sku Selling Measurement Unit CODE. This refer to the `code` of the **Measurement Unit** Entity. See [MeasurementUnit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit).

***Required*** only for new Skus

sellingUnitMultiplier.description:
The Selling Measurement Unit ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Measurement Unit** Entity. See [MeasurementUnit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit).

***Required*** only for new Skus

warehouseId.description: The Warehouse ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

quantity.description: The quantity of Skus generate in the file for the Warehouse

sku.description: The SKU Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

images.description: The list of images URL of a Sku. 20 maximum, only if 'addImages' not passed

addImages.description: The list of images URL to Add to a Sku. 20 maximum, only if 'images' not passed

skuReferenceId.description: The SKU Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

action.description:
The action to apply to Skus Images.
- `add`. This action will add the Image to the Sku without changing current images.
- `set`. This action will set the Image to the Sku and **remove** other current images.

**Important**: For an Sku all the `action` fields must be the same: `add` of `set`.

SkuImageBatchResponseItem.description: The response for a SkuImage Item Batch

skuReferenceId.description: The SKU Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

SkuImageBatchResponseItemError.description: The response for a SkuImage Item Batch

skuReferenceId.description: The SKU Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

errorMessage.description: The error message describing what was wrong with the Sku Image.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

shortDescription.description:
The Product's short description.
Brief description of the product mainly used for SEO.
For more detailed descriptions, use the property **description**.

brand.description: The Brand ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Brand** Entity. See [Brand](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Brand).

category.description: The Category ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

categoriesIds.description:
The Category Tree Identifiers. This refer to the `treeIds` and `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).
* When `categoriesBySalesChannel` is defined, this field used every `treeIds` and `id` for each Category in every Sales Channel.
* When `categoriesBySalesChannel` is not defined, it used the `treeIds` and `id` for `category` field.

suggestedCategoriesIds.description: The Category Ids Related by Suggestion for the Product . See **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

salesChannels.description: The Product Sales channels IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

attributeSetId.description: The Attribute Set ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Attribute Set** Entity. See [Attribute Set](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute-Set).

groupsIds.description:
The Product Groups IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Product Group** Entity. See [Product Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/ProductGroup).
This fields is auto-generated from the child Skus of the Product.

skus.description: The product's SKUS. It contains the main data of the SKU. See [SKU](v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

slug.description:
The Product's slug.
This field is usually used as the URL of the product.
If not sended or defined as an empty `string`, this field will take the value of `name` property separated by dashes

isNew.description: Determines if the product is new

platformFields.description:
Fields and values that are specific to the integration platforms, not used in Janis process.
This field is used to store the data that go to the integration platforms.
For the moment only accepts strings values, and final mapping (data type) depends on the integration platform.

items.description: The categories by each sales channel

salesChannelId.description: The Sales channel IDs to associate Categories IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

categoriesIds.description: The Category IDs for the `salesChannelId`. This refer to the `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

CategoriesBySalesChannelBatch.description:
The categories by sales channels used in API List for Batch Service (for Export) and API Batch.

* Key: The Sales Channel Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Sales Channel** Entity. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).
* Value: An Array of Category Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

AttributeSchema.description: View schema for Attributes according to a Product

rootComponent.description: The component of the view to be rendered. Always set as 'FormSection'.

target.description: The target endpoint of the form.

targetEndpointParameters.description: The target endpoint parameters of the form.

fieldsGroup.description:
The name of the group of attributes, if there is one or it is "generic".
Within each item of the array, there will be the name of the group and the fields.

items.description: Object containing the group name and fields

name.description: The attribute group name if any or ‘generic’

position.description: The position of the field group to be applied in the view

name.description: The Attribute ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Attribute** Entity. See [Attribute](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Attribute).

component.description: View component to use in the table field

warehouseId.description: The Warehouse ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

brand.description: The Brand name of the Product Sku

lastUpdateDate.description: The date the SkuFile was last updated for the Warehouse received

url.description: The URL to download the skus file

sizeInKb.description: The size of the file in kilobytes

schema.description: The Catalog Schema to decode the `realm` file

lastUpdateDate.description: The date the SkuFile was last updated for the Warehouse received

url.description: The URL to download the skus file

sizeInKb.description: The size of the file in kilobytes

schemas.description: Array containing Sku, ProductGroup and Brand schemas to decode the `realm` file

deltas.description: The deltas of the sku file. Only present when `lastUpdateDate` parameter is provided and within 3 days range.

url.description: The URL to download the delta.

sizeInKb.description: The size of the delta in kilobytes

product.description: The Parent Product ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Product** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product).

productReferenceId.description: The Product Reference ID. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Product** Entity. See [Product](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Product).

sellingMeasurementUnit.description: The Selling Measurement Unit Code. This refer to the `code` of the **Measurement Unit** Entity. See [MeasurementUnit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit).

measurementUnit.description: The Measurement Unit Code used to display in frontend and views. This refer to the `code` of the **Measurement Unit** Entity. See [MeasurementUnit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit).

stockMeasurementUnit.description:
The Stock Measurement Unit code, used to store the stock in the warehouse. This refer to the `code` of the **Measurement Unit** Entity. See [MeasurementUnit](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Measurement-Unit).

**Important**: When  configured, the stock will be stored in the warehouse using this measurement unit, without multiplying the selling unit multiplier.

groupsIds.description: The Product Groups IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Product Group** Entity. See [Product Group](/v2/service/catalog#tag/ProductGroup).

isNew.description: Determines if the Sku is new

commercialConditionId.description: The commercial condition ID of the Sku

modalType.description: The Modal Type of the Sku

sku.description: The Sku Image's Sku Id. This refer to the `id` of the [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) Entity.

originalUrl.description: The Sku-Image's original URL, when Image is saved by API Batch

size.description: The Sku Image's size in kb

uploadPending.description: The Sku-Image's is pending to upload

SkuImageSortList.description: The list of Sku Image IDs

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

skuId.name: id
skuId.description: The SKU ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sku** Entity. See [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

skuIds.name: skuIds
skuIds.description: A list of Related SKU's IDs.

items.description:
The unique identifier of the sku.
This refer to the `id` of the [Sku](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku) Entity.

referenceId.description: The `referenceId` of the SKU (**Full referenceId only**. No partial search. Case sensitive)

eans.description: One `ean` of the SKU (**Full ean only**. No partial search. Case sensitive)

referenceIdSearch.description: The `referenceId` of the SKU (Allows partial search, for example searching for Skus with `referenceId` ending with '448797')

eansSearch.description: One `ean` of the SKU (Allows partial search, for example searching for Skus with an `ean` ending with '98')

hasMainImage.description: Determines if the SKU has images

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

x-janis-total-created.description: The total amount of items created

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of items updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

x-janis-total-removed.description: The total amount of removed items

itemsCreated.description:
The items that were created correctly.

- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the created item.

itemsUpdated.description:
The items that were updated correctly.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the updated item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the updated item.

itemsNotModified.description:
The items that were not modified.
This occurs when the item in the service **is equal** to the received item.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the non modified item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the non modified item.

itemsError.description:
Items with some error.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the validation message error.

itemsNotModified.description: The items that were not modified.
